header_title.description: App name shown in the header. A recipe discovery app for world cuisines.

header_subtitle.text: Tse ŋkɔdzinɔwo le dzudzɔ la me le dunia gome
header_subtitle.description: Tagline shown below the app name in the header.

home_page_hero_title.description: Main heading on the home page hero section.

home_page_hero_subtitle.text: Tso dzudzɔwo aɖe le ŋkɔdzinɔƒe dzideƒe me le dunia gome
home_page_hero_subtitle.description: Subtitle text displayed under the hero heading on the home page.

home_page_featured_title.description: Section heading displayed above the recipe card grid.

recipe_card_cooking_time.description: Cooking time label on a recipe card. {minutes} is replaced with the number of minutes.

recipe_card_difficulty.description: Label displayed before the difficulty level on a recipe card.

recipe_card_easy.description: Difficulty level label indicating an easy recipe.

recipe_card_medium.description: Difficulty level label indicating a moderately difficult recipe.

recipe_card_hard.description: Difficulty level label indicating a difficult recipe.

recipe_card_ramen_name.description: Dzudzɔla si le Tonkotsu Ramen recipe me.

recipe_card_ramen_description.text: Tɔƒe pork bone broth kple chashu si wòle ɖoɖo, nu ɖoɖo egg, kple noodles si wòle dzo.
recipe_card_ramen_description.description: Dzudzɔla si le Tonkotsu Ramen recipe me.

recipe_card_margherita_name.description: Dzudzɔla si le Margherita Pizza recipe me.

recipe_card_margherita_description.text: Classic Neapolitan pizza kple San Marzano tomatoes, fresh mozzarella, kple basil.
recipe_card_margherita_description.description: Dzudzɔla si le Margherita Pizza recipe me.

recipe_card_tacos_name.description: Dzudzɔla si le Tacos al Pastor recipe me.

recipe_card_tacos_description.text: Marinated pork tacos kple pineapple, cilantro, kple onion le corn tortillas me.
recipe_card_tacos_description.description: Dzudzɔla si le Tacos al Pastor recipe me.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_name.description: Dzudzɔla si le Butter Chicken recipe me.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.text: Tender chicken le creamy tomato kple butter sauce kple aromatic spices.
recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.description: Dzudzɔla si le Butter Chicken recipe me.

recipe_card_pad_thai_name.description: Dzudzɔla si le Pad Thai recipe me.

recipe_card_pad_thai_description.text: Stir-fried rice noodles kple shrimp, tofu, peanuts, kple tamarind sauce.
recipe_card_pad_thai_description.description: Dzudzɔla si le Pad Thai recipe me.

recipe_card_crepes_name.description: Dzudzɔla si le French Crepes recipe me.

recipe_card_crepes_description.text: Thin, delicate crepes si wòle Nutella, fresh strawberries, kple whipped cream.
recipe_card_crepes_description.description: Dzudzɔla si le French Crepes recipe me.
